reasoning: Today's ride focuses on addressing the poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance you're experiencing. Your last ride showed low intensity, so we're moving into targeted over-unders to improve aerobic base, crucial for sustaining power during long climbs like Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Over-Unders: Alternate between 2 min at 242W and 3 min at 213W, repeat for 9 sets.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
